reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark evidenceStatus=satisfied only for the three eval-live CLI boundary claims covered by focused tests, command registry output, adapter validation, and explicit non-claims.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic live instance catalog and selected instance-id packet behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by eval live discover tests for explicit and command-discovered instances, checked-in workbench catalog examples with stable instanceId values, and eval live run tests that dispatch one selected instance id into a bounded request/result packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep stable instance selection separate from proof of any real consumer runtime behavior.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic adapter template validation and persona simulator CLI routing.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by adapter validation preserving simulator_persona_command_template, eval live persona_prompt loop tests that call `cautilus eval live run-simulator-persona`, and simulator request examples with stable instanceId/requestId fields.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep product-owned persona result semantics separate from adapter-owned backend choice and credentials.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the shipped Go-owned CLI command surface for eval-live runtime entrypoints.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the Go command router for `eval live discover`, `eval live run`, and `eval live run-simulator-persona`, command registry output exposing those CLI commands, focused CLI tests using the Go entrypoints, and absence of the old direct Node helper paths in this checkout.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep eval-live runtime entrypoint guidance in the CLI reference aligned with the Go command router.
